source: Shop The Look - Building a Large Scale Visual Shopping System at Pinterest.pdf

concepts.finding: Pinterest built a multi-modal visual shopping system combining object detection, embedding similarity, and human-curated fashion taxonomies to match user-uploaded photos to shoppable products with 90%+ precision.
concepts.implication: Multi-modal understanding (visual + text + taxonomy) is essential for complex product search where neither modality alone captures user intent.
concepts.open_question: How should text and visual modalities be combined for optimal query understanding when one modality is missing or noisy?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A multi-modal query understanding system combining text, image, and taxonomy signals will outperform any single-modality baseline by at least 15% on product search relevance.
